sections.paragraph:
Original: זמם

Transliteration: zâmam

Phonetic: zaw-mam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to have a thought, devise, plan, consider, purpose
    1. (Qal)
      1. to consider, fix thought upon
      2. to purpose, devise
      3. to plot (of evil intent)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 556

Part(s) of speech: Verb
